CONTACT_PAGE.INFO_INTRO: SMS2I is your trusted partner for industrial training and services. Feel free to contact us for any question or information request.
CONTACT_PAGE.ADDRESS_VALUE: 14 January Street (GP1), Neodeme Building 1st Floor, Messadine 4013, Sousse
CONTACT_PAGE.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your message was sent successfully! We will reply as soon as possible.
CONTACT_PAGE.FAQ_Q1: How can I register for a training?
CONTACT_PAGE.FAQ_A1: You can browse our available courses on the "Courses" page and contact us for more details about registration.
CONTACT_PAGE.FAQ_A2: Yes, we adapt our training programs to your company's specific needs. Contact us to discuss your requirements.
CONTACT_PAGE.FAQ_A3: Our prices vary depending on the type and duration of training. Contact us for a personalized quote.
CONTACT_PAGE.FAQ_A4: Yes, all our certified courses include a training certificate recognized in the industry.

SIEMENS.TITLE: Siemens Partner

GLOBAL.DESC: Collaboration with industrial solution providers in Africa.

QUALITY.TITLE: Certified Quality
QUALITY.DESC: Rigorous quality processes according to current international standards.

INNOVATION.TITLE: Innovative Solutions
INNOVATION.DESC: Creative approach and tailor-made solutions to meet your industrial challenges.

SUPPORT.TITLE: 24/7 Support
SUPPORT.DESC: Technical assistance available 24/7 for your industrial emergencies.

INTEGRATION.TITLE: Systems Integration
INTEGRATION.DESC: SMS2I integrates multiple solutions in various industrial fields: electrical cabinets, wiring, electrical networks, implementation of complete solutions.

AUTOMATION.TITLE: Automation and Industrial Engineering
AUTOMATION.DESC: Automation, electrical control and instrumentation, process management, and intelligent industrial networks.

MECHANICAL.TITLE: Mechanical Construction
MECHANICAL.DESC: Design and complete in-house manufacturing of special mechanical spare parts (Machining, Fitting, Assembly).

INSTRUMENTATION.TITLE: Industrial Instrumentation
INSTRUMENTATION.DESC: Installation, calibration, and supervision of measuring instruments for your production processes.

TRAINING.TITLE: Industrial Training
TRAINING.DESC: Certified training for your teams in automation, industrial supervision, and new technologies.

SUPPORT.TITLE: High Quality Customer Support
SUPPORT.DESC: Proactive assistance and technical support to ensure the availability and performance of your systems.

ON_SITE.TITLE: On-Site Training
ON_SITE.DESC: Our trainers come to your premises for training tailored to your equipment and processes.
